# nick.karnik.io — published output

**This branch is generated. Do not edit it — every change here is destroyed on the
next deploy.**

It contains only the built site. The source lives in a private repository and is
published here automatically by CI on every push to `main` there.

- Site: https://nick.karnik.io
- Each publish replaces this branch entirely (a single orphan commit), so there is
  no history to dig through here — the history is in the source repo.
- CI refuses to publish source, secrets, SQL, or dev docs. If you find any in here,
  that's a bug worth reporting.
